description_long: This is a modern mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners, finished in a glossy red color. The front features a large, black, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top, likely for a front-facing camera and sensors. The back is also red and displays a silver logo and the text 'Ramon Coppa' centered below a triple camera array, which is positioned in the upper left corner. The triple camera module is slightly raised and consists of three lenses arranged in a triangular pattern. The sides are slim, with visible physical buttons on one edge, likely for power and volume control. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, with a smooth, hard surface and a premium appearance.
description: A glossy red mobile phone with a large black display, triple rear cameras, and a silver logo on the back. The design is sleek, modern, and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, black, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the phone and the presence of physical buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the glossy red finish, triple camera array in the top left, and a silver logo with text.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness and button placement.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver logo with the text 'Ramon Coppa' is centered on the back of the phone, below the camera array.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is either turned off or in standby mode with no visible content.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, with three lenses arranged in a triangular pattern within a raised module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on one side edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker.
